```{=html}
<div id="recruitment-counter">

  <p class="counter-label" id="counter-label"></p>

  <div class="counter-numbers">
    <span id="recruited-count"></span>
    <span class="counter-sep"> / </span>
    <span id="goal-count"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="progress-track">
    <div class="progress-fill" id="progress-fill"></div>
  </div>

  <p class="counter-sub" id="counter-sub"></p>

</div>

<style>
#recruitment-counter {
  margin: 1.5rem auto 2rem auto;
  max-width: 560px;
  background: #f0f7ff;
  border: 1px solid #c2daf5;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.4rem 2rem 1.6rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.counter-label {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a4f8a;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.counter-numbers {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a4f8a;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}
.counter-sep { color: #7aabda; font-weight: 400; }
.progress-track {
  width: 100%;
  height: 18px;
  background: #d0e8f8;
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.progress-fill {
  height: 100%;
  width: 0%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2980d9, #1abc9c);
  border-radius: 999px;
  transition: width 1.2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.counter-sub { margin: 0; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #4a7aaa; }
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     EDIT ONLY THESE TWO NUMBERS — applies to
     both the French and English home pages.
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  var recruited = 10044;
  var goal      = 20000;
  /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */

  var isEn = window.location.pathname.indexOf('/en/') !== -1;
  var pct  = Math.min(100, Math.round(recruited / goal * 100));
  var locale = isEn ? 'en-CH' : 'fr-CH';

  document.getElementById('recruited-count').textContent = recruited.toLocaleString(locale);
  document.getElementById('goal-count').textContent      = goal.toLocaleString(locale);
  document.getElementById('counter-label').textContent   = isEn
    ? 'HUG Patients with a DNA sample in BioHUG'
    : 'Patients HUG dont un échantillon d'ADN est enregistré dans BioHUG';
  document.getElementById('counter-sub').textContent     = isEn
    ? pct + '% of target reached'
    : pct + ' % de l\'objectif atteint';

  setTimeout(function () {
    document.getElementById('progress-fill').style.width = pct + '%';
  }, 200);
})();
</script>
```
